title: Hody and Decken Make a Deal
description: On pages 18–20, this part follows Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Narrator, Shirahoshi, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Hody Jones, Vander Decken. The core story beat is hody and decken make a deal.
scene: The scene centers on hody and decken make a deal, with Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Narrator, Shirahoshi, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Hody Jones, Vander Decken driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ryuugu Palace, northeastern Edge - Outside Shell Tower

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Hurry, skeleton!! We must report to the King!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hooo OOOLD IT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: *Pant*... *pant*... wait... If we don't open the path into the palace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HORDY IS GOING TO KILL US ALL...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Y - Your Majeeeeeeee Eesty!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: The Princess has been kidnapped!!! Some unknown individual has removed her from the tower!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, Pirates have been raining down on the tower...!!! It's an enemy attack!!! We're under attack!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: kidnapped, you SAA AAY?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Shirahoshii is goneee Ee?! who is responsible for this?!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: an enemy attack at a time like this...? What's up with that...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did it have to be now?! They just had to attack while we're occupying the palace...!! uh... wh... what do we do now?! No!! Wait!! Don't answer that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We take 'em out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I told you not to answer!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: RUOH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't you want to get out of the Shark now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: N... NO... I still feel a little safer in here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: RUEO HH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...so how is it? Being outside for the first time in ten years!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...my heart is beating so fast... I really... shouldn't be doing this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's nothing wrong with it! You're just going outside! Man, you're so weird sometimes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Would this be what they call... an adventure...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AHAH AHAH... yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: RUD!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If it makes your heart race, that's an adventure all right!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: So, this "Ocean Forest" you were talking about... What is it? Is there fun stuff there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There is a grave!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have never been able to visit that grave even once, since it was first erected...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: For all these ten long years... I have wanted to visit it, more than anything else...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The depths

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Ten years already...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It's hard to believe so much time has passed...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...since that assassination took place in broad daylight, and shook fishman island to its core.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: ...long enough for the princes to grow into fine warriors... though Shirahoshii is still locked away in her tower...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But none of us have forgotten your precious dream...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Queen Otohime...!!!

summary: Hody and Decken Make a Deal. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
